sections.title: Coordinated Subterranean Assault
content: Dugtrio consists of three heads that move in perfect synchronization. They can burrow through even the hardest soil to depths of 60 miles.
By burrowing together, they create massive seismic disturbances that can be detected from several miles away.

sections.title: Nocturnal Obsessions
content: Meowth is fascinated by round, shiny objects. It spends its nights wandering city streets looking for dropped loose change.
The gold coin on its forehead can glow, and the Pokémon is often used as a symbol of prosperity and good fortune.

sections.title: Psychic Threshold
content: Psyduck is constantly plagued by a severe headache. When the pain reaches a critical peak, it unknowingly releases powerful psychic energy.
Because these powers are only activated in a state of extreme stress, Psyduck usually has no memory of using them.

sections.title: Preemptive Teleportation
content: Abra sleeps for 18 hours a day. Even while asleep, it can sense incoming threats and will reflexively teleport to safety.
If it doesn't get enough sleep, it loses its ability to utilize its psychic powers.

sections.title: Physical Discipline
content: Machop trains by lifting boulders and practicing various forms of martial arts. Its muscles never get sore, no matter how much it exercises.
A single Machop is strong enough to hurl 100 adult humans simultaneously.

sections.title: Gaseous Composition
content: Gastly's body is 95% gas. It can slip through any crack or crevice to reach its prey.
The gas is highly toxic; if it envelops a human, they will lose consciousness instantly.

sections.title: Shadow Mimicry
content: Gengar hides in the shadows of people or objects at night and absorbs the heat from their bodies, causing a sudden, chilling drop in temperature.
It is said that if you feel a sudden cold shiver, a Gengar is hiding right behind you.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: A classic 'Glass Cannon' in the Ultra League. Shadow Claw and Shadow Ball combined with its high attack stat make it a lethal closer if shields are down.
